{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321120642079BD779360231018E4A"}"},"total":52},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7249611553426719521","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写书不易，值得好评。
排雷完毕，轻松+套路+每日get一个技能。
优点：稳定有逻辑，看来是查了不少资料啊，就是不知道后面的剧情怎么发展。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687931861,"group_id":"7242619667385158689","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyBPntSBucLRNykPCFp8+yI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"93520286235","user_name":"南风过境3D"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93520286235","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7242619667385158689","book_info":{"abstract":"“你这命算完了。”
算命师傅话音未落，林刚当场暴毙。
然后穿越平行世界，回到2009年，就读一所普通中学。
当杀马特贵族索要保护费时，系统降临，获得每日一个生活小技术。
第一天，凭借“综合格斗术”喜获一群小弟，并且与女神成功组建“帮扶小组”。
人生从此起飞！
第二天，“钓鱼技术”。喜提爆护成就，惊呆邓老板，加入钓鱼界。
第三天，“大师级厨艺”。成功打动美食密探，吸引五星级酒店关注。
第四天，“钢琴演奏家”。吊打贵族学校校草，成为人民街最靓的仔。
......
直到第五天，事态开始朝离谱的方向发展！
“哄妹技术”
“殡仪技术”
“量子物理学”
“考古鉴定”
“按摩技术”
“......”
林刚：“什么？哄妹技术？按摩技术？这尼玛也叫生活小技术？”
许久，女神才愕然反应过来。
“小林~你还是个中学生吗？！”
“求求你做个人吧！！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob3e5a10d893cb568881759910a3a8f60~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"楚门的门","author_id":"","book_id":"7242619667385158689","book_name":"技术过于强大，女神求我做个人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#583030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7242620150069854760","read_count":"16","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"114229"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"53","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob3e5a10d893cb568881759910a3a8f60~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779250002&x-signature=VKpdNbR56py1NtQU2kGadjTpWPg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3206623775689133","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.0813045e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321120642079BD779360231018E4A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10812,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":636},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"724
